content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 LinkNow Media: B2B Sales Representative / Top Closer with Bonuses + Uncapped Commissions Anywhere in the World 🇨🇦 Canada Quebec Outreach, Sales, Cold Calling, and Deal Closure Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4991/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://linknowmedia.net/en/">https://linknowmedia.net/en/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Job description:</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">Are you a proven closer with at least two years of phone sales experience who thrives in a in a high-performance environment and wants to be rewarded for results?</p> <p class="MsoNormal">LinkNow is looking for <strong>top-performing, goal-driven closers</strong> to join our growing team. We develop dynamic websites and digital marketing solutions for over 10,000 clients across the United States and Canada, and we are seeking confident closers who know how to win deals. This is a full-time, permanent, remote B2B sales role focused on outbound calling and same-day sales. If you are persuasive, self-motivated, and excited by bonuses and uncapped commissions, we want to hear from you.</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Compensation</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">Salary Range:&nbsp;$75,000 to $130,000+ annually<br>Bonuses &amp; Commissions:&nbsp;Daily and weekly bonuses plus&nbsp;uncapped commissions<br>Average Commission:&nbsp;$100 to $450 per sale<br>Signing Bonus:&nbsp;$1,000 after one month with the company<br>Pay Schedule:&nbsp;Weekly pay</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Schedule</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">Full Time – Permanent - Remote<br>Monday to Friday<br>9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST</p> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Top Earner Stats</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Our #1 closer in 2025 took home <strong>$130,000 after bonuses and commissions!</strong></li> <li class="MsoNormal">More than <strong>25% of our sales team are earning $100,000+ per year.</strong></li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Why Join LinkNow?</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Extensive one-on-one training</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Strong manager support and ongoing coaching</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Permanent work-from-home position</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Strong growth opportunities within the company</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Diverse and energetic team environment</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Virtual company events</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>And most importantly — an exceptional time-off policy designed for real work-life balance:</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">A full week off in the summer</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Two weeks off at Christmas</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Frequent extra days off throughout the year</li> <li class="MsoNormal">35 hour work week (with a one hour lunch break)</li> <li class="MsoNormal">If you’re used to grinding nonstop in sales roles, this is a rare opportunity to <strong>earn at a high level without sacrificing your personal time</strong>.</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Present and promote our services to potential clients through outbound calls. The leads will be provided to you, this is not a prospecting role.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Sell websites and digital marketing solutions in a B2B,&nbsp;<strong>same-day sales environment.</strong></li> <li class="MsoNormal">Assess the needs of potential clients and sell solutions that best fit their business</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Build value, handle objections, and close deals</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Develop creative sales strategies for potential clients</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Participate in sales meetings and training programs</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Accurately document all relevant client information and communications in our system</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Minimum&nbsp;<strong>2 years of outbound phone sales experience</strong></li> <li class="MsoNormal">Experience in&nbsp;<strong>cold calling, outbound sales, B2B sales, and same-day sales</strong></li> <li class="MsoNormal">Excellent spoken and written English</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Strong phone presence and conversational ability</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Competitive, goal-oriented, and motivated by performance-based earnings</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Assertive, persuasive, and self-starting personality</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Ability to work independently and manage time effectively</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Desire to consistently meet and exceed sales goals</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Ability to handle pressure professionally and appropriately</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Work From Home Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Candidates must have reliable internet and a computer (<strong>Mac is not compatible</strong>)</li> <li class="MsoNormal">We must be able to install our version of Office365 on your computer</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Our preferred browser during work hours is&nbsp;<strong>Chrome</strong></li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Attractive health insurance plan after 3 months, including eye care, dental, and extended healthcare</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Free virtual doctor visits through Consult+ after 3 months</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Employee assistance programs through Telus Health One after 3 months, including one-on-one therapy sessions, financial advice, legal advice and more</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>More About Us</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">At LinkNow, we work hard and play hard. We believe in rewarding employees for their hard work because their success is our success. We are proud to have ranked on the Growth 500 list of Canada’s Fastest-Growing Companies for five consecutive years. We have also surpassed our goal of serving 10,000 clients, and we are excited about what the future holds.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">Join us and help contribute to the team that makes it all possible.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">Apply directly to our recruitment website here: https://linknowmedia.net/en/job/remote-b2b-sales-representative-closer-with-bonuses-uncap
